title: Little Paper Bow Ties
excerpt: I got this adorable Fiskars bow punch and had Jamie play around with it in the studio. The bows are tiny and adorable and she trimmed off the banner part so they looked a bit more manly. Though the punch…
body: I got this adorable Fiskars bow punch and had Jamie play around with it in the studio. The bows are tiny and adorable and she trimmed off the banner part so they looked a bit more manly. Though the punch says it's XL, the bows don't turn out that way, but we still thought they were pretty neat. You'll definitely be seeing more of these pop up in future projects!
